title: archidendron lucidum
intro: Archidendron lucidum, also known as the Batai tree, is a species of legume native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Archidendron lucidum include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and treating various skin conditions due to its antioxidant properties. The herbal preparation of Archidendron lucidum typically involves making a tea from its bark or leaves, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
